input.memoryNote: You accidentally RSVP'd to two different weddings on the same day and made us both bridesmaids at both ceremonies. We ran between venues in heels. You gave two different speeches. You cried at both. It was the most chaotic 8 hours of my entire life.

meta.tiktokHook: My sister accidentally double-booked two weddings. We were bridesmaids at BOTH. Running between venues in heels. She gave two speeches. Cried at both. I'm still recovering.
